name: Uncle Buck's Venison Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Dark brown sugar; to taste
recipeInstructions:
Heat olive oil in a large saucepan. Add onions, garlic, and bell pepper. Cook until soft.
Brown all meat and add it to the pan.
Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, seasonings, and beef stock with a wooden spoon. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and cover. Add chili peppers. Simmer for two hours, stirring occasionally.
Add kidney beans and simmer for another 30 minutes.
Remove bay leaf and serve.
